summary.lv: Ārlietu ministrijas IT departaments meklē informācijas sistēmu administratoru (5+ gadu pieredze) ar padziļinātām Microsoft on-premise zināšanām — Hyper-V klasteri, Active Directory, MS Exchange, MS SQL, SCOM/Zabbix monitorings; €2399 pārbaudes laikā, līdz €4514 pēc tā.
summary.en: The IT department of Latvia's Ministry of Foreign Affairs is hiring an Information Systems Administrator (5+ years of experience) with deep Microsoft on-premise expertise — Hyper-V clusters, Active Directory, MS Exchange, MS SQL, SCOM/Zabbix monitoring; €2399 during probation, up to €4514 after.
